title: Claude Code Automation Configuration
description: Schema for automation.config.json — defines review commands, mojibake scanning, and required file checks for Claude Code automation.

reviewCommands.description: Commands executed during automated code review. Each command has a name, shell command string, and whether it blocks the review on failure.

name.description: Human-readable name of this review check (e.g. 'TypeScript type-check').

command.description: Shell command to run for this review check.

required.description: If true, failure of this command blocks the review from passing.

mojibakeScan.description: Mojibake (乱码) detector configuration. Scans specified paths for file-encoding corruption in source files.

paths.description: Directory paths to scan for encoding errors.

extensions.description: File glob patterns to include in the scan.

requiredFiles.description: Files that must exist in the project. Used to verify project structure integrity before automated operations.
